title: The Afro BOAT PARTY (Black and White edition)
venue: Tereza Joanne Boat, King George V Dock
description:
Join one of the most exciting Afro boat parties in London on Sunday, 30th August 2026, from 8PM to 3AM aboard the Tereza Joanne Boat at King George V Dock, E16 2JU. Enjoy a vibrant night of Afrobeats, Amapiano, and Afrohouse with live DJs, African drummers, BBQ, and amazing party vibes. Dress in black and white and dance the night away on the water.

Tickets coming soon – don't miss this unforgettable London boat party experience.
